title: 14 MCP tools registered beyond the minimum required
evidence: src/server.ts:78-498 registers search_matches, head_to_head, team_record, team_competitions, search_players, players_by_club, standings, competition_summary, match_statistics, biggest_wins, top_scoring_teams, best_venue_records, list_competitions, dataset_info
suggestion: No action needed — additional discovery tools (list_competitions, dataset_info) and analytical tools (competition_summary, players_by_club, best_venue_records, top_scoring_teams) enhance usability

title: Cross-source deduplication via selectCanonical prevents inflated statistics
evidence: src/data/loader.ts:248-301 defines SOURCE_PRIORITY per competition and selectCanonical() picks one canonical source per (competition, season)
suggestion: No action needed — handles overlapping datasets correctly

title: 24 BDD-style sample-question tests cover realistic query scenarios
evidence: tests/sample-questions.test.ts covers 24 end-to-end scenarios including Flamengo 2019 championship, head-to-head derbies, player searches, standings verification
suggestion: No action needed — exceeds typical test coverage for this task

title: Robust team name normalization handles accents, state suffixes, and variants
evidence: src/data/normalize.ts:1-210 implements base#state key scheme, stripAccents(), teamsMatch() for fuzzy matching across heterogeneous CSV sources
suggestion: No action needed — directly addresses spec's Data Quality Notes on team name variations
